## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between 7shifts and GrowthX for AI-powered content creation and marketing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation that can significantly reduce costs (from $600-1000+ per piece to \~$130) while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach is flexible, aiming to complement existing teams and processes rather than replace them](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [7shifts is interested but needs to involve more stakeholders and understand how it fits with their current content/SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [A follow-up demo with additional 7shifts team members will be scheduled to explore the partnership further](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Topics

### Kyle's Experience with GrowthX at Homebase

  - [Implemented SEO changes at Homebase, achieving 140-170% YoY non-brand traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [High content costs ($400k+ per quarter) led to exploring GrowthX's services](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [GrowthX reduced content costs from $600-1000+ per piece to \~$130](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Focus shifted to driving "starter" signups, which had higher payroll adoption rates](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Capabilities

  - [Acts as an extension of the client's team, plugging into existing processes](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Can work across the marketing funnel, not just top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Offers programmatic solutions for various content types (e.g., podcast transcription, webinar content)](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Aims to free up marketing teams for more creative thinking and strategic work](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Uses AI-powered workflows to generate high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)

### 7shifts' Current Content and SEO Situation

  - [Experiencing declining organic traffic and flat direct traffic](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Has a 4-person content team with diverse responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Currently uses an external SEO strategist](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Exploring channel diversification beyond paid acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [In early stages of payroll product offering, facing challenges in market positioning](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

### Potential Partnership Structure

  - [GrowthX can adapt to 7shifts' existing content structure and team](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Opportunity to increase content production and explore new content types](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Flexible engagement models based on client needs and budget](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Focus on providing true user value and avoiding AI-generated content pitfalls](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a follow-up demo/call with additional 7shifts team members (Director of Content, Head of Revenue Marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Libby to send calendar options for the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=2145.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare a more detailed presentation of their services and potential impact for 7shifts](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=2102.0)
  - [7shifts to consider budget allocation and internal alignment for potential GrowthX partnership](https://fathom.video/share/VbczTngJZGcmyqDan7kYsDsoeRW2zmrn?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
